name: Idle Champions Automatic Formation Planner
description: Build a local-first automatic formation planner and simulator for Idle Champions Helper. Work is split into small TDD stories for unattended Ralph execution.

qualityGates: npm run typecheck must pass when TypeScript files are touched
Each completed story must have a dedicated commit
No credentials, private snapshots, .env*.local, tmp/private-user-data/**, dist, or generated dependency folders may be committed

userStories.title: Persist planner docs
userStories.description: Create the planner documentation set so future agents can recover the plan after context compaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/modules/planner/auto-formation-planner-plan.md
Create docs/modules/planner/prd.md
Create docs/modules/planner/development-design.md
Create docs/modules/planner/final-todo.md
Docs indexes point to the planner module
No real credentials or private snapshots appear in docs
Dedicated commit: planner: US-001 persist planner docs

userStories.title: Ralph planner package is runnable
userStories.description: Ensure the planner Ralph task package has scripts, prompt, JSON task tracker, decision log, and structural validation.
acceptanceCriteria: .ralph/scripts/validate-task.sh planner passes
run-task.sh uses .ralph/tasks/planner/prd.json, ralph-prompt.md, and decision-log.md
planner run.sh delegates to the generic run-task.sh script
Dedicated commit: planner: US-002 add ralph planner package

userStories.title: Sensitive output scanner
userStories.description: Add a scanner that prevents credentials, private snapshots, and private paths from entering committed or built files.
acceptanceCriteria: Fake credential fixtures are detected
Placeholder-only docs are not treated as secrets
tmp/private-user-data references in committed source are detected
Dedicated commit: planner: US-003 add sensitive output scanner

userStories.title: Private env loader
userStories.description: Read local development credentials only from process environment or explicit .local files.
acceptanceCriteria: IC_PRIVATE_USER_ID and IC_PRIVATE_HASH are read from environment
Explicit .local fixture can be parsed
Missing credentials fail without printing secrets
VITE_ credential keys are rejected
Dedicated commit: planner: US-004 add private env loader

userStories.title: Private snapshot manifest
userStories.description: Create a safe manifest writer for local private user-data snapshots under tmp/private-user-data.
acceptanceCriteria: Output path is forced under tmp/private-user-data/<timestamp>
Manifest masks user id and hash
Unsafe output directories are rejected
Dedicated commit: planner: US-005 add private snapshot manifest

userStories.title: User profile domain types
userStories.description: Define local user profile, owned champion, equipment, feat, legendary, and imported formation save types.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimal owned champion fixture type-checks
Imported formation save fixture includes specializations, feats, familiars, and scenario references
Snapshot builders tolerate missing optional sections with warnings
Dedicated commit: planner: US-006 add user profile domain types

userStories.title: User profile IndexedDB store
userStories.description: Persist normalized private user snapshots and optional credential vault records in IndexedDB.
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot save/read/delete works with fake-indexeddb
Default flow does not save credentials
Delete clears snapshot and optional credential vault
Dedicated commit: planner: US-007 add user profile store

userStories.title: Official read-only client allowlist
userStories.description: Build a front-end official data client that permits only read-only user-data calls.
acceptanceCriteria: getuserdetails, getcampaigndetails, and getallformationsaves are allowed
claim, purchase, save, redeem, and other write-like calls are rejected
Fetch options omit credentials, referrer, and cache
Dedicated commit: planner: US-008 add official read-only client

userStories.title: User payload normalizer
userStories.description: Normalize mock official user-data payloads into UserProfileSnapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: Mock getuserdetails extracts owned heroes, equipment, feats, legendary info, and warnings
Mock getcampaigndetails extracts campaign/favor data where present
Mock getallformationsaves extracts imported formation saves
Missing fields produce warnings rather than crashes
Dedicated commit: planner: US-009 add user payload normalizer

userStories.title: User data page manual sync model
userStories.description: Extend the user data page model to represent parsed credentials, manual sync, snapshot age, errors, and deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: No-snapshot state offers credential parsing and manual sync
Stored snapshot state shows private data age in days
Sync errors are displayed without credentials
Delete clears snapshot and optional vault
Dedicated commit: planner: US-010 add user data manual sync model

userStories.title: GameNumber parse and format
userStories.description: Introduce a simulator-local GameNumber wrapper around a high-range incremental-game number library.
acceptanceCriteria: Add break_eternity.js dependency
Format values above Number.MAX_VALUE in game notation
Invalid input fails predictably
Dedicated commit: planner: US-011A add game number parse format

userStories.title: GameNumber arithmetic and compare
userStories.description: Add multiplication, division, power, log10, and deterministic comparison for very large game numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: 1.5e92 multiplied by 2.72e75 sorts near 4.08e167
Division and power preserve expected ordering
Sorting huge values is deterministic
Dedicated commit: planner: US-011B add game number arithmetic

userStories.title: GameNumber additive threshold
userStories.description: Add large-number addition behavior that ignores terms too small to affect game-display precision.
acceptanceCriteria: 1e100 + 1e99 changes the displayed mantissa
1e100 + 1e80 returns the larger term for display and ordering
Threshold is centralized and documented
Dedicated commit: planner: US-011C add game number addition threshold

userStories.title: Last specialization baseline extraction
userStories.description: Extract the minimum meaningful level baseline from champion specialization upgrades.
acceptanceCriteria: Highest specialization required level is returned
No-specialization champions use documented fallback
Malformed levels are warned and ignored
Dedicated commit: planner: US-012 add specialization baseline

userStories.title: Gold budget baseline interface
userStories.description: Add a gold-budget level baseline interface that uses target budget and last specialization requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Cost curve and budget return affordable level
Below-specialization budgets are marked below-baseline
No default 100-level mode is exposed
Dedicated commit: planner: US-013 add gold budget baseline

userStories.title: Simulator data coverage report
userStories.description: Audit definitions coverage for simulator usefulness and future normalization work.
acceptanceCriteria: Known useful definition keys can be marked covered or uncovered
Unknown keys are preserved for review
Report includes usefulness, current output, and next action
Dedicated commit: planner: US-014 add simulator data coverage report

userStories.title: Champion simulation profile projection
userStories.description: Project champion detail data into simulator-friendly profiles while preserving raw effect strings.
acceptanceCriteria: Projection extracts upgrades, feats, loot, legendary effects, and raw effect strings
Unknown effects are preserved in unsupportedEffects
Localized names are included for explanation
Dedicated commit: planner: US-015 add champion simulation profile

userStories.title: Effect parser core DPS group
userStories.description: Parse the first core DPS effect prefixes into typed simulator effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse global_dps_multiplier_mult
Parse hero_dps_multiplier_mult
Unknown prefix returns unsupported result
Dedicated commit: planner: US-016 add core dps effect parser

userStories.title: Effect parser positional and tag group
userStories.description: Parse adjacent and tagged champion multiplier hints where possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Adjacent target hints are parsed
Tagged champion multiplier hints are parsed
Unsupported positional formats preserve explanation
Dedicated commit: planner: US-017 add positional tag effect parser

userStories.title: Variant rule projection
userStories.description: Project variant mechanics into planner constraints and warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Project only_allow_crusaders
Project disallow_crusaders
Project force_use_heroes
Unknown mechanics are preserved as warnings
Dedicated commit: planner: US-018 add variant rule projection

userStories.title: Candidate pool modes
userStories.description: Build candidate pools for owned-only, all-hypothetical, and manual override modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Owned-only mode returns only owned champions
All-hypothetical mode includes unowned champions with assumptions
Manual override mode does not mutate the profile snapshot
Dedicated commit: planner: US-019 add candidate pool modes

userStories.title: Hypothetical fairness baseline
userStories.description: Use account-derived medians for unowned champion assumptions when possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Same-seat median equipment is used when available
Account-wide median is used when same-seat data is unavailable
Empty account fallback is marked as no-equipment/no-feat
Dedicated commit: planner: US-020 add hypothetical fairness baseline

userStories.title: Imported formation save normalizer
userStories.description: Normalize saved in-game formations from user data into planner-usable records.
acceptanceCriteria: Mock getallformationsaves payload converts to ImportedFormationSave
Specializations, feats, familiars, favorite flag, and scenario relation are preserved
Unknown formation layout ids are warned rather than silently dropped
Dedicated commit: planner: US-021 add imported formation save normalizer

userStories.title: Planner formation legality
userStories.description: Validate planner formations for seat conflicts, banned champions, forced champions, and locked slots.
acceptanceCriteria: Seat conflicts are detected
Banned champions are detected
Missing forced champions are detected
Locked or occupied slots are detected
Dedicated commit: planner: US-022 add formation legality checks

userStories.title: Steady-state scoring fixture
userStories.description: Evaluate a small steady-state formation fixture with adjacent support, global DPS, and unsupported warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Bruenor-like adjacent support scores higher when adjacent
Global DPS support applies regardless of adjacency
Unsupported effects appear in result warnings
Dedicated commit: planner: US-023 add steady state scoring

userStories.title: Beam search candidate ranking
userStories.description: Search a small formation space and rank top candidate formations.
acceptanceCriteria: A 4-slot deterministic fixture returns expected top result
Beam width limits candidate expansion
Top results include score, placements, explanations, and warnings
Dedicated commit: planner: US-024 add beam search ranking

userStories.title: Planner route and navigation
userStories.description: Add a route and navigation entry for the planner workbench.
acceptanceCriteria: /planner renders the planner page
Navigation includes Automatic Planner
HashRouter compatibility is preserved
Dedicated commit: planner: US-025 add planner route

userStories.title: Planner profile state panel
userStories.description: Show planner profile availability, private data age, stale state, and manual refresh guidance.
acceptanceCriteria: No-profile state links to user data page
Existing profile shows age in days
Sync warning is visible and does not auto-refresh
Dedicated commit: planner: US-026 add planner profile state

userStories.title: Planner scenario selection
userStories.description: Allow text filtering and selection of variants for planner input.
acceptanceCriteria: Variant list can be filtered by text
Selecting a variant shows formation and restriction summary
Long restriction text remains accessible as text
Dedicated commit: planner: US-027 add planner scenario selection

userStories.title: Planner result card
userStories.description: Render planner result cards with game notation, slots, explanations, and warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Score is shown in game notation
Slot assignments are visible as text
Explanation and unsupported warning sections are visible
Dedicated commit: planner: US-028 add planner result card

userStories.title: Save planner result as preset
userStories.description: Save a selected planner result into the existing formation preset system.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking save writes a formation preset
Saved preset preserves layoutId, placements, and scenarioRef
Invalid result disables save
Dedicated commit: planner: US-029 save planner result as preset

userStories.title: Privacy scan npm script
userStories.description: Expose the sensitive-output scanner as an npm privacy gate.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run privacy:scan exists
Scanner checks src, public, docs, tests, and dist when present
Scanner fails on fixture secrets and passes normal placeholders
Dedicated commit: planner: US-030 add privacy scan script

userStories.title: Planner documentation sync
userStories.description: Synchronize README and docs after the planner route and core behavior exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Root README mentions planner once route exists
Docs index points to planner module docs
final-todo lists speed/gem, survival, balanced scoring, step simulation, and manual parameter panel
Dedicated commit: planner: US-031 sync planner docs

userStories.title: Final regression
userStories.description: Run and fix final planner regression gates.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run lint passes
npm run typecheck passes
npm run test:run passes
npm run build passes
npm run privacy:scan passes
Dedicated commit: planner: US-032 final regression
